title: AN ACT EXTENDING THE LIFE OF THE HUMAN RIGHTS VICTIMS CLAIMS BOARD, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE SECTION 29 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10368 ENTITLED, âAN ACT PROVIDING FOR REPARATION AND RECOGNITION OF VICTIMS OF HUMAN RIGHTS VIOLATIONS DURING THE MARCOS REGIME, DOCUMENTATION OF SAID VIOLATIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSESâ

chunks.text:
S. No. 3153 H. No. 6412; 112 OG No. 21, 3262 (May 23, 2016)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10766, April 19, 2016 ]

AN ACT EXTENDING THE LIFE OF THE HUMAN RIGHTS VICTIMS CLAIMS BOARD, AMENDING FOR THIS PURPOSE SECTION 29 OF REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10368 ENTITLED, âAN ACT PROVIDING FOR REPARATION AND RECOGNITION OF VICTIMS OF HUMAN RIGHTS VIOLATIONS DURING THE MARCOS REGIME, DOCUMENTATION OF SAID VIOLATIONS, APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR AND FOR OTHER PURPOSESâ

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Section 29 of Republic Act No. 10368 is hereby amended to read as follows:

âSEC. 29.

Work Period; Sunset Clause.

â The Board shall complete its work within four (4) years from May 12, 2014. After such period, it shall become functus officio.â

SEC. 2.

Repealing Clause.

â All laws, presidents decrees, executive orders, resolutions, rules or regulations, or any part thereof which are inconsistent with any of the provisions of this Act, are hereby repealed or modified accordingly.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect upon its complete publication in a newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

(Sgd.)

FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

Senate Bill No 3153, which was approved by the Senate on February 1, 2016, was adopted as an amendment to House Bill No. 6412 by the House of Representatives on February 2, 2016.

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

(Sgd.)

OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

Approved:

APR 19 2016

(Sgd.) B

ENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
